The Tin Woodman requests a heart. Oz uses shears to cut into the Woodman's tin chest, inserts a silk-and-sawdust heart, and solders the metal shut. The Woodman experiences an immediate emotional awakening.
The Tin Woodman stands in a state of desperation before the Wizard.
